```{r}
library(nflfastR)
library(dplyr, warn.conflicts = FALSE)
```

```{r}
ids <- nflfastR::fast_scraper_schedules(2024:2024) %>%
  dplyr::pull(game_id)

future::plan("multisession")
pbp <- nflfastR::build_nflfastR_pbp(ids)

colnames(pbp)
```
```{r}
pbp |> filter(replay_or_challenge == TRUE)
```
```{r}
pbp |> filter(replay_or_challenge == TRUE) |> select(game_id, home_team, away_team, season_type, week, game_date, game_half, replay_or_challenge_result, desc) |> filter(str_detect(desc, "challenge"))
```
